task_name: Add Auth Persistence Readiness Review Suite Coverage
goal: Add Auth/Persistence Readiness Candidate checks to the shared Bluepilot review suite and document the new local review coverage.
claims: BP-064 adds Auth/Persistence Readiness Candidate checks to the shared Bluepilot review suite.
BP-064 adds output invariant coverage that keeps identity_ready, persistence_ready, approval_record_allowed, builder_task_create_allowed, and builder_execute_allowed false.
BP-064 does not change Auth/Persistence Readiness Candidate runtime behavior or fixtures.
assumptions: BP-063 already introduced the local Auth/Persistence Readiness Candidate mock and golden fixtures.
Review suite coverage should remain the shared entry point for local reviewers.
Invariant tests are needed before expanding toward any auth, DB, persistence, approval record, or Builder adapter handoff.
dod: tools/test-bluepilot-review-suite.cjs runs Auth/Persistence Readiness Candidate syntax, fixtures, and invariant checks.
docs/BLUEPILOT_REVIEW_SUITE_v0.md mentions Auth/Persistence Readiness Candidate coverage and limits.
stop_conditions: Auth/Persistence Readiness Candidate runtime or fixture changes become necessary
Auth implementation, persistence, approval recording, live Builder, DB, deploy, task create, execute, approve, or push becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-063 added a local Auth/Persistence Readiness Candidate mock but did not yet wire it into the shared Bluepilot Review Suite.
